name: studyforrest
description: A pioneering naturalistic-stimulation project built around the movie 'Forrest Gump'. The core 7T dataset includes 20 participants listening to the audio film, with extensions adding audio-visual movie fMRI (15 participants), simultaneous eye-tracking, and a public MEG recording (11 participants). Its rich social narrative supports research on language, emotion, and social perception in continuous real-world contexts.
citation: Hanke M, Adelhöfer N, Kottke D, et al. (2016). A studyforrest extension, simultaneous fMRI and eye gaze recordings during prolonged natural stimulation. Scientific Data, 3, 160092.

publications.title: A studyforrest extension, MEG recordings while watching the audio-visual movie 'Forrest Gump'
